name: Zesty Red Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a small microwavable bowl and mix well.
2. Place the bowl in the center of the microwave.
3. Heat on HIGH (100% power) for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes, stirring halfway through the heating time.
4. Alternatively, you may heat the mixture in a small saucepan over low heat until it is warm.
